mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_stats (target_type, target_id, stat_date, daily_play_count, daily_collect_count, daily_comment_count) VALUES (#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{statDate}, 1, 0, 0) ON CONFLICT (target_type, target_id, stat_date) DO UPDATE SET daily_play_count = daily_stats.daily_play_count + 1

INSERT INTO daily_stats (target_type, target_id, stat_date, daily_play_count, daily_collect_count, daily_comment_count) VALUES (#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{statDate}, 0, 1, 0) ON CONFLICT (target_type, target_id, stat_date) DO UPDATE SET daily_collect_count = daily_stats.daily_collect_count + 1

INSERT INTO daily_stats (target_type, target_id, stat_date, daily_play_count, daily_collect_count, daily_comment_count) VALUES (#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{statDate}, 0, 0, 1) ON CONFLICT (target_type, target_id, stat_date) DO UPDATE SET daily_comment_count = daily_stats.daily_comment_count + 1

INSERT INTO daily_stats (target_type, target_id, stat_date, daily_play_count, daily_collect_count, daily_comment_count) VALUES
(#{item.targetType}, #{item.targetId}, #{item.statDate}, 0, 0, 0)
ON CONFLICT (target_type, target_id, stat_date) DO NOTHING
